[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [52°07′45″N 106°38′32″W﻿ / ﻿52.1292°N 106.6422°W﻿ / 52.1292; -106.6422](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Saskatoon_Theological_Union&params=52.1292_N_106.6422_W_)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The **Saskatoon Theologican Union** is an alliance of three [Protestant](/wiki/Protestant "Protestant") theological colleges at the [University of Saskatchewan](/wiki/University_of_Saskatchewan "University of Saskatchewan").[[1]](#cite_note-ARCH-1)

* [College of Emmanuel and St. Chad](/wiki/College_of_Emmanuel_and_St._Chad "College of Emmanuel and St. Chad") ([Anglican Church of Canada](/wiki/Anglican_Church_of_Canada "Anglican Church of Canada"))
* [Lutheran Theological Seminary, Saskatoon](/wiki/Lutheran_Theological_Seminary,_Saskatoon "Lutheran Theological Seminary, Saskatoon") ([Evangelical Lutheran Church in Canada](/wiki/Evangelical_Lutheran_Church_in_Canada "Evangelical Lutheran Church in Canada"))
* [St. Andrew's College](/wiki/St._Andrew%27s_College,_Saskatoon "St. Andrew's College, Saskatoon") ([United Church of Canada](/wiki/United_Church_of_Canada "United Church of Canada"))[[2]](#cite_note-2)

In 1969 the three colleges came together and created the Graduate Theological Union of Saskatoon; this became known as the Saskatoon Theological Union.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

There is a [Roman Catholic](/wiki/Roman_Catholic "Roman Catholic") college at the university, [St. Thomas More College](/wiki/St._Thomas_More_College "St. Thomas More College"), which is not a member of the union.[[1]](#cite_note-ARCH-1)
